note: rect = [x, y, width, height] in PDF points, y measured from the BOTTOM of the page. Fields 'name', 'class' and 'level' each have a second widget on page 2 (mirrored value). 'foundry' is the suggested Shadowdark system data source for the exporter.

fields.description: XP needed for next level (10 x level)

fields.foundry: derived: sum of carried item slots
